item.title: Reading Log
item.description: 0% Timur Kuran – Private Truths, Public Lies: The Social Consequences of Preference Falsification 25% Reeves Wiedemann – Billion Dollar Loser: The Epic Rise and Spectacular Fall of Adam Neumann and WeWork 10% Thomas Lin – The Prime Number Conspiracy: The Biggest Ideas in Math from Quanta
